name: Mubashir Rehman
anchorTagline: Backend engineer who ships AI & automation into production
remote: Open to remote roles (any timezone) · On-site in Lahore, PK
bio: Backend-focused Software Engineer with 3+ years building production systems for AI automation, distributed architectures, and cloud infrastructure. I've shipped backend platforms across LinkedIn content automation, crypto/social intelligence, HRMS/ERP customization, and healthcare integration tooling; led a 4-engineer drone-control team; and co-authored peer-reviewed ML research (Circuits, Systems, and Signal Processing, Springer 2025). I care about clean design, measurable impact, and systems that hold up under pressure.
availabilityNote: Open to remote roles · any timezone

highlights: Primary backend engineer — owned the core backend of a multi-tenant SaaS platform (7 services, 60+ REST endpoints) end to end, from schema to deploy, authoring the bulk of the codebase
Built 7 backend services and 60+ REST endpoints with Django REST Framework, including auth, background jobs, and integration workflows
Cut prompt deployment from hours to minutes with versioned prompt management + n8n across AI content pipelines
Multi-tier profile extraction (LinkedIn API → scraper → OpenAI fallback) for high-completeness data enrichment
Real-time notifications with WebSockets via Django Channels; Stripe-based subscription billing; OAuth2 + JWT refresh auth
Semantic search using Google Gemini embeddings + pgvector (768-d) with Redis caching
Architected a real-time crypto/social intelligence platform (FastAPI, ~10 services) ingesting Telegram, Discord, and X
Async multi-chain blockchain analysis; ML-based DEX scam-token detection (~92% on internal test set)
Integrated MindsDB and Databricks for enterprise AI workflows; optimized PostgreSQL schemas
Migrated and extended a Django-based HRMS for a ~200-employee workforce: biometric attendance sync (ZKTeco), reporting endpoints, and zero-downtime rolling deploys
Built a healthcare HL7 integration operations web tool replicating key Mirth Connect actions; customized ERPNext/Frappe v16 with custom doctypes and a task-tree view
Deployed internal LLM inference (vLLM + LiteLLM, Qwen3-8B-AWQ) behind an OpenAI-compatible API for team use
Led a team of 4 building QGroundControl-based drone swarm control (C++ / Qt / QML) for 10+ UAVs at 50Hz telemetry
Built an MQTT telemetry pipeline designed for ~10K msg/sec with multithreading and multiprocessing
Custom mission-planning tools that meaningfully cut planning time; Gazebo SITL multi-drone simulation
Python ground control with Olympe/Sphinx, real-time video streaming, and OpenCV object detection to Android GCS
AWS infrastructure automation (Boto3): VPCs, EC2, IAM, ECS Fargate Flask deployment
Dockerized CI/CD + Vagrant cross-platform testing across Agile sprints
Built an AI prompt-management web app (FastAPI/Django, OpenAI GPT-4 streaming, LangChain, RBAC, S3)
Mentored 60+ graduate students in Advanced OS, Virtualization, and Distributed Systems
Analyzed foundational research papers including Scheduler Activations, Exokernel, and GFS
Designed lab assignments for 100+ undergraduates in multithreading, file systems, and system calls
Guided 15+ research projects in memory management and distributed systems
Endless runner (Unity/C#) with object pooling for reduced memory footprint; 5K+ downloads, 4.2★ rating
Web game (PlayCanvas/JS) with scene pre-loading, object pooling, and cross-browser optimization
Integrated Google Play Services for leaderboards and achievements

education.note: Fully funded STFS scholarship by Pakistan Science Foundation

education.institution: Govt. M. A. Jinnah High School

publications.title: Evaluation of a Low-Cost Single-Lead ECG Module for Vascular Ageing Prediction and Studying Smoking-Induced Changes in ECG
publications.authors: Syed Anas Ali; Muhammad Saqib Niaz; Mubashir Rehman; Ahsan Mehmood; M. Mahboob Ur Rahman; Kashif Riaz; Qammer H. Abbasi
publications.equalContribution: Ali, Niaz & Rehman contributed equally to this work
publications.contribution: Data collection, ML pipeline (signal preprocessing, segmentation, feature engineering), and model training & evaluation (Random Forest, ResNet-18 transfer learning).
publications.journal: Circuits, Systems, and Signal Processing (CSSP), Springer

achievements: Co-authored (equal contribution) peer-reviewed ML/IoT research in Circuits, Systems, and Signal Processing (Springer, 2025) — DOI 10.1007/s00034-025-03048-2
Primary backend engineer at TransData — owned the core backend (7 services, 60+ REST endpoints) of a multi-tenant SaaS platform, authoring the bulk of the codebase
Led a 4-engineer team delivering a real-time drone swarm control system
Built and open-sourced HireTrack — an AI, bring-your-own-key résumé-tailoring and job-pipeline tool
PEEF Scholarship recipient for academic excellence
STFS (Science Talent Farming Scheme) Scholarship recipient
Dalda Scholarship recipient for academic merit
